option.name: originalContent
option.value:
Feature: Add to cart feature (BDD examples) In order to verify add to cart functionality As a tester I want readable scenarios demonstrating positive and negative flows
Scenario: Add a product to the cart successfully Given I am logged in as "standard_user" When I add "Sauce Labs Backpack" to my cart Then the cart badge should show "1"
Scenario: Removing product empties the cart Given I am logged in as "standard_user" When I add "Sauce Labs Bike Light" to my cart And I open the cart and remove that product Then the cart page should contain "Sauce Labs Bike Light"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Feature: Add to cart feature (BDD examples) In order to verify add to cart functionality As a tester I want readable scenarios demonstrating positive and negative flows
Scenario: Add a product to the cart successfully Given I am logged in as "standard_user" When I add "Sauce Labs Backpack" to my cart Then the cart badge should show "1"
Scenario: Removing product empties the cart Given I am logged in as "standard_user" When I add "Sauce Labs Bike Light" to my cart And I open the cart and remove that product Then the cart should be empty
Scenario: Attempting to checkout with empty cart Given I am logged in as "standard_user" When I open the cart Then the cart should be empty

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "http://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd"> <suite name="SauceDemo Automation Suite"> <listeners> <listener class-name="com.saucedemo.listeners.TextReportListener"/> <listener class-name="com.saucedemo.listeners.HtmlReportListener"/> </listeners> <test name="SauceDemo Tests"> <classes> <!-- Unit Tests with Given-When-Then pattern --> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginDataDrivenTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_AddToCartTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_RemoveFromCartTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_CheckoutSuccessTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_SortProductsTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginWithEmptyCredentialsTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginWithInvalidCredentialsTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_CheckoutEmptyCartTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_AddDuplicateProductTest"/> <!-- Cucumber runner --> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.CucumberTestRunner"/> </classes> </test> </suite>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "http://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd"> <suite name="SauceDemo Automation Suite"> <listeners> <listener class-name="com.saucedemo.listeners.TextReportListener"/> <listener class-name="com.saucedemo.listeners.HtmlReportListener"/> </listeners> <test name="SauceDemo Tests"> <classes> <!-- Unit Tests with Given-When-Then pattern --> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginDataDrivenTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_AddToCartTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_RemoveFromCartTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_CheckoutSuccessTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_SortProductsTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginWithEmptyCredentialsTest"/> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.TC_LoginWithInvalidCredentialsTest"/> <!-- Cucumber runner --> <class name="com.saucedemo.tests.CucumberTestRunner"/> </classes> </test> </suite>
